overlays.title: AI governance overlay
overlays.focus: AI inventory, provider/deployer role, oversight, and documentation

questions.title: Do you inventory AI systems and distinguish provider / deployer / integrator roles?
questions.help: Role clarity matters in regulation and accountability.

questions.title: Do you document human oversight and explainability expectations?
questions.help: Operational governance matters even before formal legal classification.

remediations.action: Create an AI system inventory with role and use-case classification.
Document oversight, risk acceptance, and model-change controls.
Refresh AI inventory and decisioning controls periodically.
